category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs South Korea KC Mark and KATS/KEMCO requirements.

title.en: China-to-South Korea Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入韩国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入韓國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against South Korea's KC Mark, the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, KS C IEC 60335-2-24 safety, KC-EMC, the energy efficiency grade label (KEMCO/KEA), the Clean Air Conservation Act, and K-REACH chemical requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与韩国KC标志、《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》、KS C IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、KC-EMC、能效等级标识（KEMCO/KEA）、《大气环境保全法》及K-REACH化学要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與韓國KC標誌、《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》、KS C IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、KC-EMC、能效等級標識（KEMCO/KEA）、《大氣環境保全法》及K-REACH化學要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, certification-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current South Korean legislation, KS standards, KC certification routes, energy efficiency grade thresholds, refrigerant provisions, and KATS/KEMCO requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认证机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行韩国法律、KS标准、KC认证路径、能效等级门槛值、制冷剂条款及KATS/KEMCO要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認證機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行韓國法律、KS標準、KC認證路徑、能效等級門檻值、製冷劑條款及KATS/KEMCO要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major South Korea compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety re-certification to KS C IEC 60335-2-24 under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act — refrigerators fall under KC Safety Confirmation (안전확인) and CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted; (2) energy efficiency grade re-rating to the Korean 1-to-5 grade methodology and mandatory registration with the Korea Energy Agency (KEA/KEMCO) before sale; (3) KC-EMC re-testing under the same Act and RRA rules — Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test data cannot substitute, and the 60 Hz grid differs from China's 50 Hz; and (4) a local responsible party in Korea (importer or KC certificate holder) is required to apply for KC and hold the technical documentation. R600a refrigerant is well-positioned, but charge documentation against KS C IEC 60335-2-24 and Clean Air Conservation Act handling rules must be verified.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大韩国合规差距：（1）依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》按KS C IEC 60335-2-24重新认证电气安全——电冰箱属KC安全确认（안전확인），CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受；（2）按韩国1至5级方法重新评定能效等级，并在销售前向韩国能源公团（KEA/KEMCO）完成强制登记；（3）依据同一法律及RRA规则重新进行KC-EMC检测——中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测数据不能替代，且60 Hz电网与中国50 Hz不同；（4）须由韩国本地责任主体（进口商或KC证书持有人）申请KC并保存技术文件。R600a制冷剂条件良好，但须核实充注量文件是否符合KS C IEC 60335-2-24及《大气环境保全法》处理规定。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大韓國合規差距：（1）依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》按KS C IEC 60335-2-24重新認證電氣安全——電冰箱屬KC安全確認（안전확인），CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受；（2）按韓國1至5級方法重新評定能效等級，並在銷售前向韓國能源公團（KEA/KEMCO）完成強制登記；（3）依據同一法律及RRA規則重新進行KC-EMC檢測——中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測數據不能替代，且60 Hz電網與中國50 Hz不同；（4）須由韓國本地責任主體（進口商或KC證書持有人）申請KC並保存技術文件。R600a製冷劑條件良好，但須核實充注量文件是否符合KS C IEC 60335-2-24及《大氣環境保全法》處理規定。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, certification body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. KATS (kats.go.kr), the National Law Information Center (law.go.kr), the Korea Energy Agency (energy.or.kr), RRA (rra.go.kr) and the Safety Korea portal are the canonical sources for South Korean legislation and standards.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.

q.en: Does a Chinese refrigerator's CCC certification satisfy South Korea's KC requirements?
q.zh: 中国冰箱的CCC认证是否满足韩国KC要求？
q.zht: 中國冰箱的CCC認證是否滿足韓國KC要求？

a.en: No. The KC Mark requires conformity under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act, with safety tested to KS C IEC 60335-2-24 and EMC tested under KC-EMC rules. Chinese CCC certification references GB standards and is not accepted as equivalent for South Korean market access; refrigerators must obtain KC Safety Confirmation (안전확인) through a KATS-designated body.
a.zh: 不。KC标志须依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得，安全按KS C IEC 60335-2-24检测，电磁兼容按KC-EMC规则检测。中国CCC认证参考GB标准，不被接受为进入韩国市场的等效证明；电冰箱须通过KATS指定机构取得KC安全确认（안전확인）。
a.zht: 不。KC標誌須依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》取得，安全按KS C IEC 60335-2-24檢測，電磁相容按KC-EMC規則檢測。中國CCC認證參考GB標準，不被接受為進入韓國市場的等效證明；電冰箱須通過KATS指定機構取得KC安全確認（안전확인）。

q.en: Is energy efficiency grade registration mandatory for refrigerators in South Korea?
q.zh: 韩国冰箱是否须强制登记能效等级？
q.zht: 韓國冰箱是否須強制登記能效等級？

a.en: Yes. Under the Energy Use Rationalization Act and its efficiency management regulations, household refrigerators are a mandatory energy efficiency grade label item. The supplier must test the model, assign a 1-to-5 efficiency grade, and register it with the Korea Energy Agency (KEA, which administers KEMCO programmes) before sale. The grade label must be affixed and meet the minimum energy performance standard (MEPS) or the product cannot be sold.
a.zh: 是的。根据《能源利用合理化法》及其能效管理规定，家用电冰箱属强制性能效等级标识产品。供应商须对型号进行检测，评定1至5级能效等级，并在销售前向韩国能源公团（KEA，负责管理KEMCO项目）登记。能效等级标识须加贴并满足最低能效标准（MEPS），否则产品不得销售。
a.zht: 是的。根據《能源利用合理化法》及其能效管理規定，家用電冰箱屬強制性能效等級標識產品。供應商須對型號進行檢測，評定1至5級能效等級，並在銷售前向韓國能源公團（KEA，負責管理KEMCO項目）登記。能效等級標識須加貼並滿足最低能效標準（MEPS），否則產品不得銷售。

q.en: Is R600a (isobutane) permitted as a refrigerant in South Korean household refrigerators?
q.zh: R600a（异丁烷）是否被允许作为韩国家用冰箱的制冷剂？
q.zht: R600a（異丁烷）是否被允許作為韓國家用冰箱的製冷劑？

a.en: Yes. R600a is widely used in South Korean household refrigerators as a low-GWP hydrocarbon refrigerant. However, refrigerant charge limits and flammability safety requirements under KS C IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA must be met, and HFC handling and recovery are governed by the Clean Air Conservation Act and related F-gas management rules. R134a (HFC) is not prohibited but faces phase-down pressure under Korea's Kigali Amendment commitments.
a.zh: 是的。R600a在韩国家用冰箱中被广泛用作低GWP碳氢化合物制冷剂。但须符合KS C IEC 60335-2-24附录AA下的制冷剂充注量限制和可燃性安全要求，HFC的处理与回收受《大气环境保全法》及相关氟气体管理规定约束。R134a（HFC）未被禁止，但在韩国基加利修正案承诺下面临削减压力。
a.zht: 是的。R600a在韓國家用冰箱中被廣泛用作低GWP碳氫化合物製冷劑。但須符合KS C IEC 60335-2-24附錄AA下的製冷劑充注量限制和可燃性安全要求，HFC的處理與回收受《大氣環境保全法》及相關氟氣體管理規定約束。R134a（HFC）未被禁止，但在韓國基加利修正案承諾下面臨削減壓力。
